seoTitle: Bell vs Bellambi — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bell and Bellambi. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bell and Bellambi.
heading: Bell vs Bellambi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bell, New South Wales and Bellambi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bellambi has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bell (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bell or Bellambi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bell has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Bellambi scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bell scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Bellambi scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bell or Bellambi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bellambi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
